1 #ifndef _SIMULATIONUTILITY_HPP
2 #define _SIMULATIONUTILITY_HPP
3 
4 #include "ros/ros.h"
5 #include <XmlRpcValue.h>
6 
7 namespace Simulation {
8 
9  namespace Communication {
10 
11  const std::string allRobots = "allRobots";
12  const std::string allRobotsExceptSelf = "allRobotsExceptSelf";
13  } // namespace Communication
14 
15  std::vector<std::string> getRobotList() {
16  ros::NodeHandle nh;
17 
18  std::vector<std::string> robot_list;
19 
20  XmlRpc::XmlRpcValue config_robot_list;
21  if (!nh.getParam("/robot_list", config_robot_list)) {
22  ROS_ERROR("No robot_list was found");
23  }
24 
25  for (int i = 0; i < config_robot_list.size(); i++)
26  robot_list.push_back(config_robot_list[i]);
27 
28  return robot_list;
29  }
30 
31  std::string getParamRobotName() {
32  std::string robot_name;
33 
34  if (!ros::param::get(
35  "~robot_name",
36  robot_name)) // The ~ is used to get param declared inside the <node></node> tags
37  {
38  ROS_INFO("No param name was given. pioneer_1 will be used instead");
39  robot_name = "pioneer_1";
40  }
41 
42  return robot_name;
43  }
44 
45  struct Angle {
46  float inRadians;
47  float inDegrees;
48  Angle(float val, bool isRad) {
49  if (isRad) {
50  inRadians = val;
51  inDegrees = val * 180 / M_PI;
52  } else {
53  inDegrees = val;
54  inRadians = val * M_PI / 180;
55  }
56  }
57  };
58 
59 } // namespace Simulation
60 
61 #endif // _SIMULATIONUTILITY_HPP
